risks.title: Event Deduplication Issue
risks.evidence: 4 events detected for Security.tsx with duplicates at identical/near-identical timestamps (events 1-2 at 19:02:39.03Z, events 3-4 at 19:02:22.47Z)
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer logging mechanism to prevent duplicate event generation; could mask real changes

risks.title: Rapid Changes to Security Module
risks.evidence: Multiple modifications to Security.tsx within 17 seconds suggests iterative changes without clear validation
risks.recommendedAction: Review changes in Security.tsx to ensure no incomplete refactoring or security vulnerabilities were introduced

opportunities.title: Automated Security File Testing
opportunities.evidence: Events suggest Security.tsx is actively modified; high-relevance events recommend security test execution
opportunities.suggestedAction: Implement automated security tests to run on every Security.tsx modification

opportunities.title: Event Deduplication System
opportunities.evidence: Clear duplicate events with near-identical timestamps indicate opportunity to improve observability reliability
opportunities.suggestedAction: Build event deduplication logic in code-observer to reduce noise and improve signal clarity

recommendations.title: Fix Event Deduplication
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal-to-noise ratio; 50% of incoming events appear to be duplicates
recommendations.action: Add deduplication logic to code-observer; implement timestamp windowing (e.g., 100ms) to collapse near-identical events
